intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-1: The single green sprout visible in the EARLIEST image has vanished by T-1, indicating either rapid senescence or removal.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Static state; no biological activity or change observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. The lack of photosynthetic tissue suggests the specimens have either been removed or have completely decomposed/withered beyond recognition.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered plant life, leaving only the inanimate rabbit anchor and empty pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: Upon meticulous audit of the sequence, it is evident that the biome has suffered a catastrophic loss of all plant specimens. The EARLIEST image showed a single, solitary sprout, which has since been lost. The current state is one of complete botanical vacancy. The environment is currently non-viable for the registered species.
